title: Compliance: C l2_payload.h dispatch byte
description: Policy: 02-physical-link.md §4.1. File: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/include/lichen/l2_payload.h. Status: COMPLIANT. Lines 35-41 explicitly check payload[0] == LICHEN_L2_DISPATCH_SCHC (0x14U) and payload[0] == LICHEN_L2_DISPATCH_ROUTING (0x15U) before classification.
